logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

error.methodNotAllowedDeferSessionRequired: Method not allowed, defer session required.

user.emailMismatch: The email you entered does not match the email on your account.
user.notFound: We couldn't find your account. Please check your credentials.
user.alreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
user.infoNotFound: We couldn't retrieve your account information.
user.emailNotFound: No account found with this email address.
user.alreadyHasPassword: You already have a password set. Please use the <bold>forgot password</bold> flow to reset your password.
user.alreadyExistsUseAnotherEmail: An account with this email already exists. Please use a different email.

session.notFresh: Your session is not fresh. Please log in again.
session.creation: Unable to start your session. Please try logging in again.
session.retrieval: Your session could not be retrieved. Please log in again.
session.expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue.

account.linkedAccountAlreadyExists: This account is already linked to another user.
account.creation: We encountered an issue creating your account. Please try again.
account.update: We couldn't update your account. Please try again.

credentials.notFound: We couldn't find your login credentials.

password.invalid: The password you entered is incorrect.
password.tooShort: Your password must be at least 8 characters long.
password.alreadySet: You already have a password set. Please use the <bold>forgot password</bold> flow to reset your password.

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
email.notVerified: Please verify your email address before continuing.
email.cannotUpdate: This email address cannot be updated.

credentials.invalidEmailOrPassword: The email or password you entered is incorrect.

social.alreadyLinked: This social account is already connected to another user.
social.providerNotFound: This login method is not available.
social.unlinkLastAccount: You must keep at least one login method connected to your account.

token.invalid: Your authentication token is invalid. Please try logging in again.
token.idNotSupported: This authentication method is not supported.
token.expired: Your authentication token has expired. Please try logging in again.
